scene: A horizontal {{material}} tile spanning {{block_width}} cells wide by 1 cell tall that completely fills the canvas edge-to-edge, featuring a bold centered {{centerpiece_type}} in a flat graphic style, reading as one cohesive piece with no visible background outside the tile.

subjects.size: approximately 50% of tile height, centered horizontally
subjects.interaction: sole focal element anchoring the horizontal block

style: flat vector, bold cel-shaded, high-contrast graphic style
lighting: simple two-tone cel shading with highlight on upper-left and shadow on lower-right

background.details: NO background layer. The {{material}} tile itself occupies 100% of the canvas. No white, black, or transparent margins.

composition: centered symmetrical layout; {{centerpiece_type}} anchors the middle; the entire {{block_width}}:1 rectangle reads as a single unified block, not {{block_width}} separate tiles; generous negative space around the icon
medium: digital vector-style illustration with minimal texture
details: tile extends fully to canvas edges
no outer margin of any color
outermost 8-10% of tile darkens using the base {{material}} tone only
edge darkening is part of the tile surface, not a background
limited to 2-3 tonal shades for clarity
the block must read as ONE cohesive horizontal piece, not {{block_width}} repeated squares
effects: surface-integrated vignette using multiply shading of {{material}} color
usage_notes: The tile MUST fill the entire image. Do not render a white, black, or transparent background behind it. There should be no visible margin around the tile. The design must NOT look like {{block_width}} identical tiles side by side - one unified horizontal piece with a centered focal point.
negative_prompt: {{block_width}} separate square tiles placed side by side
